title: Seth Rogen Claims a Hollywood Megastar Quit 'Knocked Up' Over a Birthing Scene

Rogen says the star was uncomfortable with a graphic child birth scene.  The film ultimately starred Catherine Haggle opposite Rogen.  That birthing scene is a major plot point.
